title: nephrodium exaltatum
intro: Nephrodium exaltatum, also known as the exalted fern or maidenhair fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nephrodium exaltatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often made by steeping the dried leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol to create a medicinal extract.
